label: Hero Banner
description: Full-width header image with headline and tagline.

label: Text Block
description: Rich text content area. Body copy, about section.

label: Image Gallery
description: Grid of product or portfolio images.

label: About Section
description: Company or personal bio block.

label: FAQ Block
description: Collapsible frequently asked questions.

label: Footer
description: Site footer with links, copyright, contact info.

label: Shop Front
description: Full e-commerce storefront. Enables product listings and checkout.

label: Product Listing
description: Individual product cards with buy button.

label: Price Table
description: Service tiers or pricing comparison table.

label: Checkout Widget
description: Embedded checkout and PayPass integration.

label: Contact Form
description: Visitor inquiry form. Routes to JeeMail.

label: Newsletter Signup
description: Email list capture. Builds subscriber base.

label: Guestbook
description: Classic year-2000 visitor guestbook. Actors post here.

label: Live Chat
description: Real-time chat widget. Connects to Black Cherry SMS.

label: Poll Widget
description: Visitor poll. Actors vote and drive traffic.

label: Forum Thread
description: Embedded live comment thread. Actor-populated.

label: Media Player
description: Embedded audio player. Requires Media Player app.

label: Video Embed
description: MyTube video embed. Drives referral traffic.

label: Ad Banner Slot
description: 468x60 IAB banner. Earns ad revenue from actor traffic.

label: News Ticker
description: Scrolling headline ticker. Pulls from Hargrove Herald.

label: Basic Firewall
description: Entry-level traffic filtering. Reduces attack damage taken.
defenseDescription: +15 Security. Reduces all incoming attack damage by 10%.

label: Advanced Firewall
description: Deep packet inspection. Significantly hardens site against attacks.
defenseDescription: +28 Security. Reduces attack damage by 20%. Blocks low-DC attacks outright.

label: DDoS Shield
description: Traffic flood mitigation. Specifically counters Traffic Flood attacks.
defenseDescription: +10 Security, +15 Uptime. Traffic Flood attacks deal 50% reduced damage.

label: Intrusion Detection
description: Monitors for attack signatures. Alerts operator via Black Cherry when attack is detected.
defenseDescription: +12 Security. Sends Black Cherry SMS alert when site is attacked.

label: Redundant Hosting
description: Mirror servers absorb damage. Health drain attacks deal reduced damage.
defenseDescription: +20 Health buffer, +10 Uptime. Health Drain attacks deal 40% reduced damage.

label: SSL Certificate
description: HTTPS encryption. Minor security boost. Shows padlock in WorldNet Explorer.
defenseDescription: +8 Security, +5 Reputation. Shows padlock icon in browser address bar.

label: Honeypot Trap
description: Decoy system. When triggered, fires notoriety damage back at the attacker.
defenseDescription: +5 Security. When an attack fails, attacker gains +8 notoriety instead of +standard amount.
